headline: Frontier LLMs out of the box cannot safely run autonomous operations: with no verifier and no domain data they emit infeasible, unsafe plans. Safe autonomy needs the verifier gate + recursive TRM repair + a small model trained on verified traces.

hud_leaderboard.agent: Open/fallback gateway LLM — raw HUD baseline

raw_llm_failure_modes: JSON mode: returns an empty schedule (0 jobs completed)
plain mode: truncates mid-plan (reasoning eats the token budget) -> unparseable
no verifier: machine overlap, material arrives late, unqualified operator, hallucinated machines
no safety control: runs a degraded machine uninspected, pushes humans into fatigue overtime
result: a single irreversible unsafe action would cap autonomy (no license earned)
